name: Tiny Idle Garden
shortDescription: Plant seeds and watch flowers grow and bloom in real time under a drifting day–night sky—it keeps growing while you're away.

name: Star Click Sky
shortDescription: Click to burst stars into a drifting cosmos of nebulae and shooting stars—your stars connect into glowing constellations.

name: Tic-Tac-Toe
shortDescription: Classic noughts and crosses vs the computer—Chill mode is winnable, Ruthless is an unbeatable minimax AI. Neon board, instant rematch.

name: Rock Paper Scissors
shortDescription: Throw rock, paper, or scissors against the computer, watch the clash, and chase a winning streak.

name: Three Doors
shortDescription: The Monty Hall problem as a game show—pick a door, the host reveals a goat, then switch or stay. Watch the 2/3 vs 1/3 win rates emerge.

name: Memory Match
shortDescription: Flip cards two at a time and find every pair from memory. Three grid sizes, a move counter, and a timer.

name: Snake
shortDescription: Classic neon snake—eat, grow, and chase a high score with arrow keys, WASD, swipe, or the on-screen pad. Best score saved locally.

name: Weird Generative Canvas
shortDescription: A generative-art playground: flow fields, harmonographs, swarms, and kaleidoscopes. Switch modes and palettes, drag to steer, and save a PNG.

name: Dice Roller
shortDescription: Roll faceted 3D dice—d4 through d20, solo or a whole pool at once. They tumble and settle fair, with a running total and history.

name: Magic 8-Ball
shortDescription: Ask a yes/no question and shake the glossy 8-ball—the window clouds over and the blue triangle surfaces with your answer.

name: Blob Choir
shortDescription: A cluster of glowing gooey blobs that sing warm synth voices. Tap or drag to play; hit Shimmer for generative ambient.

name: Coin Flip
shortDescription: Toss a real 3D gold coin—it arcs, tumbles, and lands heads or tails with cryptographically fair odds. Tracks streaks and your run.

name: Breathing Pacer
shortDescription: A calm glowing orb that expands and contracts to pace your breath—Calm, Box, or 4·7·8, with an optional ambient tone.

name: Meeting Cost Meter
shortDescription: Set the hourly rate and headcount, hit start, and watch a live dollar counter climb as the meeting drags on.

name: Goo Cursor
shortDescription: Chrome-and-lava metaballs that trail your cursor and merge like living ferrofluid. Tap to splat.
